case_title: ROBERT A RIDDELL VS. VACATION RENTER SOLUTIONS, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RIDDELL, ROBERT A AS TO DEFENDANT VACATION RENTER SOLUTIONS, LLC VACATION RENTER SOLUTIONS LLC  DBA ALWAYSONVACATIO N.COM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIDDELL, ROBERT A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VACATION RENTER SOLUTIONS, LLC VACATION RENTER SOLUTIONS LLC  DBA ALWAYSONVACATIO N.COM BASED ON THE EVIDENCE AND APPLICABLE LAWS, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE CONTACTS BETWEEN DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF FALL WITHIN THE BUSINESS-TO-BUSINESS EXCEPTIONS OF THE STATE AND FEDERAL STATUTES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
